text.content: The MT150 boasts its specialty in wet surfaces, encompassing a Z-Lug, self-cleaning stepped tread pattern for excellent traction while maintaining maximum cut and wear resistance. Featuring a heavy-duty carcass for stability and minimum sliding design, the MT150 is available in narrow and wide widths for multiple working environments.
